sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94604" key="skatami/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκαταμίζω</orth>, <sense id="n94604.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐσκατάμιζεν</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκατός</orth> and <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκάτους</orth>, gen. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σκῶρ</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
